full_suite.failure_notes: All 32 failures are outside the two owned files, but no clean pre-change HEAD run proves every failure pre-existing, so failures_all_preexisting remains false. Failure attribution: (1) 18 unowned CAL/protected-fixture drift failures: test_compare_img1605_partial_labels_rejects_current_bad_proposal; twelve test_court_finding_technology_benchmark failures (distance-mask selector, refined selector, regulation selector, temporal adapter, persistent adapter, temporal regulation, temporal selector, p95 summary, balanced selector, persistent-tail selector, reviewed oracle, temporal reviewed oracle); test_build_report_includes_img1605_partial_visible_gate; test_img1605_progress_builds_partial_visible_label_payload; both test_court_partial_geometry cases; and test_lm_homography_report_scores_reviewed_full_labels_without_claiming_verified. Observed drift includes 15 vs 14 visible points, 3 vs 1 temporal frames, 4 vs 5 scored clips, and frame_000060 vs frame_000151. (2) Eight sandbox socket-bind failures: all three failing court_keypoint_review_server tests, all three failing review_input_server tests, and both failing sam3dbody_persistent_worker tests; PermissionError [Errno 1]. (3) test_wolverine_seg6_fixture_falls_back_to_anchor_bvp_and_render_samples_stay_in_bounds returned degraded instead of ran. (4) test_public_eval_persists_probability_maxima_and_nonfinite_count raised StopIteration in eval_event_head.py. (5) test_real_scaffold_tool_index_matches_checked_in_schema saw three unrelated unknown-category CLIs; ingest_cvat_court_images was correctly indexed as dataset with its direct test. (6) test_train_court_model_v2_cli_cpu_smoke_beats_random_init exceeded its 540-second timeout. (7) Both storage-policy failures came from unrelated tracked holdout_eval_20260721 artifacts.
